comment.body: we held over the centroid, wa s line in sand, got the bid to test the pivot, passed the pivot made it close to higher target. Reversion, couldn't get beyond (so far) still over the pivot. Likely to stick to pivot or still pin to the target with time to expiry. Else, volatility may induce some selling back towards the centroid bc "As the profile is almost symmetric, this line is the center of the “fly structure”. A very steep and strong reversion line (line-in-the-sand); I would add 6842.18 to watch into opening too"
